narrative:
Hubbard City 2C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 898 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 33.4%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 21.7 percentage points.
